zh.lifeSummary: 當Petronilla de Vaux於1255年出生在英國諾福爾可特尼時，她的父親John de Vaux35歲，母親Sybil de Longchamps34歲。她於1288年8月4日與William de Nerford結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1326年8月20日在英國諾福爾可斯吉頓享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vaux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: habitational name from any of various places in northern France called Vaux, from the Old French plural of val ‘valley’. Compare English Vause and French Devaux .

History: Richard Vaux (1749–90) emigrated from Sussex, England, to Philadelphia, PA, in early youth. Calvert Vaux, landscape architect, emigrated from London, England, to America in 1850 and designed several major US parks, including Central Park in New York City (with Frederick Olmstead). — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors (along with its variant Veaux and altered form Devoe ) and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Vause
meanings: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Vaux (see Vaux ), a common French placename, singular and plural of val ‘valley’, the plural form being Latinized in surnames as de Vallibus. Norman lords with this surname are recorded in 12th- and early 13th-century records in Cumberland (Irthington), Devon (Farwood, in Colyton), East Yorkshire (Warter), Essex (Belchamp), and Leicestershire (Belvoir). Compare Vale .

nickname perhaps from Middle English fals, faus, vaus (Old French fals, faus, Old English fals) ‘deceitful, disloyal, dishonest, mendacious’, but it is more likely the name arises from 1, with the common Anglo-Norman French substitution of le for de in their surname.

nameMeanings.name: Petronilla
meanings: An old female name; an Italian diminutive formed from Pietro, i.e. Peter.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Petronilla de Vaux was born in 1255, in Pentney, Norfolk, England, her father, John de Vaux, was 35 and her mother, Sybil de Longchamps, was 34. She married William de Nerford on 4 August 1288. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 20 August 1326, in Skeyton, Norfolk, England, at the age of 71.

Elle a épousé William de Nerford le 4 août 1288. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 20 août 1326, à Skeyton, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Petronilla de Vaux(이)가 1255년 영국 노르폴크 펜트니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Vaux(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sybil de Longchamps(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 1288년 8월 4일 William de Nerford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1326년 8월 20일 영국 노르폴크 스케이턴에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Petronilla de Vaux родилась в 1255 г. в местности пентни, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Vaux было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Sybil de Longchamps, 34. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Nerford 4 августа 1288 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 20 августа 1326 г. в местности скитон, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 71 год.
